summary: Meal Plan Accuracy Pass — both proof points verified. PROOF 1: POST /api/mealplan/alternate returns day_totals with all required keys (total_calories, total_protein, total_carbs, total_fats) and alternate_meal calories are within ±10% of the replaced meal (769→768 cal, 0.1% diff). PROOF 2: POST /api/mealplans/generate honours calorie_adjustment=300 — plan.target_calories=2588 = base_calories(2288) + 300. All 5 tests passed (100%).
critical_code_review_comments: PROOF 1 verified at server.py lines 7638-7658: day recomputed after swap, day_totals returned with all 4 keys
PROOF 1: alternate_meal 'Grilled Sirloin Steak with Sweet Potato & Asparagus' = 768 cal (original 769 cal) — diff=1 cal (0.1%), well within ±10% tolerance
PROOF 2 verified at server.py lines 5009-5010: manual_cal_adj applied as target_cal = macros['calories'] + manual_cal_adj
PROOF 2: base_calories=2288, calorie_adjustment=300, plan.target_calories=2588 — exact match
Calorie_adjustment zero-baseline test also passed: adj=0 → target_calories=2288 == base_cal
seed_data_creation: calorie_adjustment reset to 0 after Proof 2 test via test_calorie_adjustment_zero_baseline
context_for_next_testing_agent: Meal Plan Accuracy Pass spec fully verified. Change 3 (day_totals in /api/mealplan/alternate) and Change 1 (calorie_adjustment in /api/mealplans/generate) both working correctly. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_meal_plan_accuracy_pass.py. Profile cbd82a69-3a37-48c2-88e8-0fe95081fa4b has calorie_adjustment reset to 0 after testing.
rca_of_issue: No issues found. Both changes are correctly implemented and producing expected results.
